helpful: Google Web Search was critical in discovering that the related petition (No. 25-34) was dismissed under Rule 46.1, completely altering the posture of this case.
gaps: CourtListener MCP search by docket number (e.g. 25-34) did not surface the Supreme Court docket easily, requiring fallback to Google Web Search.
notes: The pipeline provided `documents.json` and the petition text which contained the critical cross-reference to No. 25-34.
